name: Stuffed Zucchini #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim ends off zucchini; cut in half lengthwise; scoop out centers, leaving about 1/4 inch around skins.
2. Combine zucchini centers in a frying pan with all other ingredients except eggs and parsley.
3. Saute for 30 minutes.
4. Place zucchini in a baking dish; stuff with rice-vegetable mix; spoon any extra around the zucchini; cover with foil.
5. Bake for 20 minutes at 350 degrees.
6. Prick holes in foil for steam to escape.
7. Beat together eggs and parsley; pour over stuffed zucchini.
8. Recover and continue cooking for 10 more minutes.
